author: Opher
msg: Yes. The consensus for turning off IPv6 was that the 5G gateways can cause packet loss and jitter from the IPv4 to IPv6 translation. So that means bad performance on telemetry tasks from devices. So the other changes I mentioned should have streamlined Unity traffic to and from the devices.

author: Opher
msg: I mean I don’t really have any hard evidence of the specific changes being the solution other than after those changes I’ve been receiving high rewards for those specific boxes.
